column1: Separate Credit Approval decision at the sub loan level under OMNI Loan - Recommendation
column53: Not Applicable (Story Extension of Previous Sprint Story)
column585:
{color:#172b4d}*+RECOMMENDATION+*{color}
 * A new column 'decision' is required in product type decision list for all the sub loans where separate recommendation decision can be taken at sub loan level in an omni loan. It will be a checkbox. This column will be added before recommended amount field. By default all the checboxes will come checked when user lands on recommendation stage.
 * If any subloan is not recommended then recommended limit field will be disabled and application will move to credit approval with the all the subloans.
 * It is applicable for both subloan and credit card grids.
 * If even one of the sub loan is selected as recommended then application level decision will change to recommended. This field will be disabled. If all the subloans are marked not recommended then application decision will be updated to not recommended and on MTNS application will move to next stage.
